tenders_map_hero_title: Bankimonline invites mortgage brokers: Open your successful office today!
tenders_for_brokers_subtitle: Join our broker network and grow your business with Bankimonline.
brokers_clients_text: We bring qualified clients; you earn commissions on successful mortgage deals.
brokers_earnings_text: Competitive commissions and bonuses for every deal you close.
brokers_license_text: Full support for licensing and ongoing training to help you succeed.
brokers_step_1: Fill out the questionnaire on our website
brokers_step_1_desc: Simply fill out a short questionnaire on our website to join our program.
brokers_step_2_desc: We will conclude an agency agreement to transfer unique clients to you.
brokers_step_3: We will conclude an agency agreement to transfer unique clients to you
brokers_step_3_desc: If you are a good fit we sign an agreement under which we transfer exclusive clients to you.
brokers_step_4: We open an office for you and train you to work with our digital services
brokers_step_4_desc: We will not only open an office but also provide equipment for comfortable work. We will train you in all the intricacies of working with Bankimonline digital services to set up business processes for your office.
brokers_step_5: You receive stable income on individual terms
brokers_step_5_desc: Bankimonline digital services work 24/7 so you receive stable income according to the individual terms of the agency agreement.
tenders_yellow_description: Bankimonline provides its clients and partners with a single digital service for all types of lending
tenders_profit_title: We bring clients - You get a percentage of the mortgage deal
tenders_profit_description: We will bring you exclusive clients and you will receive commission for the mortgage deal.
tenders_turnkey_title: Turnkey business: equipped office and ready client base
tenders_turnkey_bullet_1: You get an equipped office under your management
tenders_turnkey_bullet_3: You get rights to use our brand
tenders_turnkey_bullet_4: We take on the marketing expenses
tenders_turnkey_2_bullet_1: Convenient CRM system for client management
tenders_turnkey_2_bullet_2: Ready client base from the Bankimonline platform
tenders_turnkey_2_bullet_3: Business card website for your business
tenders_turnkey_2_bullet_4: Hands-on launch guidance from our experts
tenders_turnkey_3_title: Tools to scale revenue and deal flow
tenders_form_cta_title: Do you want to receive stable income? Bankimonline will help you with this.
tenders_office_badge_text:
Obtaining an equipped office under your management.
Manager contacts.
tenders_franchise_note: Depending on your experience and capabilities, we will make you an individual offer
